title: Contact Us About NLR
text:
Find a contact to help answer your question, resolve a website issue, or direct any comments you may have.
Careers and Employment
Job, Internship, and Postdoc Opportunities
If you have a question about a job, internship, or postdoctoral position, or want to report an issue with the application process or online recruitment tool, contact us about careers.
Employment Verification
Contact us to verify the employment of a current or former NLR (previously NREL) employee.
Product and Service Procurement
If you are interested in providing NLR with a product or service, see NLR's procurement process and opportunities.
If you have a small business, you can register to become an NLR vendor or subcontractor.
Note: As a U.S. Department of Energy research laboratory, NLR does not sell any products nor can it recommend any.
Innovation and Partnership Opportunities
Inventions and Inventors
If you have invented an energy technology, learn about NLR's innovation and entrepreneurship programs. Also, see FAQs about working with NLR.
Partnerships
If you are with an organization or company interested in partnering with NLR, contact us about partnering with NLR.
NLR Tours
If you are interested in touring NLR, see information about the lab's public tours and community programs. If you have questions, contact the NLR Visits Team.
Popular Data and Tools
ATB: Annual Technology Baseline
If you have questions about or are experiencing issues with Annual Technology Baseline (ATB) data, contact the ATB Team.
PVWatts Calculator
If you are experiencing issues with or have any questions about the calculator, contact the PVWatts Team.
NSRDB: National Solar Radiation Database
If you have any questions about or are experiencing issues with finding or viewing solar radiation data, including TMY data, contact the National Solar Radiation Database Team.
SAM: System Advisor Model
If you are experiencing issues with or have any questions about the System Advisor Model (SAM), contact SAM Support.
Other Inquiries
Use the form below to send us your comments and questions, to report problems with the site, or to ask for help in finding information on our site.
